title: TitanPRO™ Crown Back Banquet Chair - Black Frame - Black Fabric
features: Built to withstand years of use and durable enough for everyday commercial settings, this TitanPRO™ Crown Back Banquet Chair supports more than 500 pounds and still maintains a lightweight steel frame for easy transport and storage that you consistently seek in the event industry.
Never worry about comfort again with the high-density foam padded seat cushion, ensuring that guests can sit comfortably for long periods of time.

The professional-grade crown back design adds a touch of elegance to the chair, making it a perfect choice for weddings, parties, conference centers, hotels and other venues where guests might gather.

Like all stacking chairs from EventStable, this banquet chair ships free when you buy 50 or more or when you combine your banquet chair purchase with tables for a total over $5k!Built to withstand years of use and durable enough for everyday commercial settings, this chair supports more than 500 lbs. and still maintains a light weight steel frame for easy transport and storage that you consistently seek in the event industry.
